title: iberis spathulata
intro: Iberis spathulata, also known as the Spatulate Candytuft, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis spathulata include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Iberis spathulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its benefits.
